emptyState.title: Add your first contact
emptyState.body: Contacts belong to companies. Once added, you'll see them in the left panel and on the company's detail page.

emptyFiltered.title: No results for the selected filters.

addContactModal.title: Add contact
addContactModal.subtitle: Enter a name and any additional contact details.
addContactModal.companyHint: Contacts belong to a company — you'll see them on its detail page.
addContactModal.saveError: Failed to save the contact. Check the details and try again.

editContactModal.title: Edit contact
editContactModal.subtitle: Changes propagate to the deals and emails the contact appears in.
editContactModal.companyRemovePending: The company will be removed on save.
editContactModal.companyUnresolved: Pick a company from the list, or cancel the company change.
editContactModal.firstNameRequired: First and last name cannot be empty.

contactDetail.selectPrompt: Select a contact from the list.
contactDetail.noCompany: This contact doesn't have an assigned company yet.
contactDetail.assignCompanyError: Failed to assign the company to the contact.
contactDetail.noContactInfo: No email or phone number has been added for this contact yet.
